steps.title: Identify exponential growth
steps.content: Exponential growth means the quantity is multiplied by the same factor each time period. A constant percent increase gives a repeated multiplier greater than $1$. A constant amount added each hour would describe linear growth instead.

steps.title: Classify the choices
steps.content: A $12\%$ hourly increase means the bacteria count is multiplied by $1.12$ each hour, so that is exponential growth. Adding $1{,}200$ each hour is a constant difference, not a constant multiplier. A $12\%$ hourly decrease is exponential decay, and subtracting $1{,}200$ each hour is linear decay. The answer is A.
